positive: A stylized, minimalist illustration of a glowing constellation map overlaying a group of ancient, geometric forest animals (deer, fox, owl, raven). The animals are rendered with clean, bold silhouettes and subtle internal glow lines, suggesting celestial origins. The background should be a deep indigo night sky with visible, stylized constellations. Focus on strong contrast between the glowing subjects and the dark background. The overall aesthetic should be mystical, elegant, and highly detailed while maintaining a clean, print-friendly, tattoo-style outline look. Centered composition, suitable for apparel printing. Color palette: deep indigo, celestial gold, forest emerald, and crisp white accents. Highly stylized vector art, graphic novel quality, crisp edges, perfect symmetry.
negative: blur, artifacts, text, watermark, noisy, grain, low detail, extra limbs, bad anatomy, smudge, signature, logo, trademark, caption
